name: Orecchiette Dell'ortolano (Garderner's Sytle Little Ear Pa
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and slice the eggplant into 1/2 inch thick rounds, peel and seed the red bell peppers.
2. Clean, boil and cut the fava beans into 1-inch pieces.
3. Cook the asparagus in lightly salted water for about 4 minutes until tender, then drain.
4. Drop the orecchiette pasta into rapidly boiling, lightly salted water. Stir well and cook for 8 minutes or al dente.
5. Heat olive oil in a large skillet, add garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
6. Add eggplant, bell peppers, asparagus and fava beans to the skillet with some salt and pepper. Cook for 3 minutes on medium heat.
7. Drain the pasta, reserving a small amount of cooking water. Add the pasta to the skillet with the vegetables and toss well.
8. Serve hot in heated pasta bowls.
